title: Whisked Saudia Sea Bass Crumble
description: A savory and dense brunch-mood dish featuring moist sea bass fillets mixed with a flavorful crumbly mixture.
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Season sea bass fillets with salt, pepper, and ground cumin. Drizzle olive oil over them.
In a mixing bowl, combine minced onion, fresh parsley, lemon juice, garlic, ground coriander, turkish sumac, and salt/pepper to taste. Mix well until the mixture is cohesive and crumbly.
Evenly spread the crumbly mixture on top of each sea bass fillet. Place fillets in a baking dish. Drizzle with more olive oil if needed.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until the fish is cooked through, the topping is golden brown and crispy, and you can smell the fragrant spices.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh mint or dill for extra freshness.
